content.claim: Since 2012–13, the state centralized diagnostic and support infrastructure from municipalities to regional pedagogical assistance services, removing local authority control over assessment networks.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: The administrative efficacy of the centralized system compared to the prior municipal system is not measured
The extent to which centralization affected identification rates or equity is not specified
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
